title: BEM-657 fix telegram YAML
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

wf=wfs/'telegram-send-smoke.yml'
wf.write_text('''name: Telegram Send Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/telegram_send_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: telegram-send-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  telegram-send-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check smoke recorder
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Send Telegram smoke message
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt
            printf '{"ok":false,"description":"missing secret"}' > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json
          else
            MESSAGE="BEM-657 | TELEGRAM DELIVERY SMOKE | workflow_runtime"$'\n\n'"Проверка доставки Telegram из GitHub Actions. Если это сообщение получено, bot/chat secrets and sendMessage path work."
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text=${MESSAGE}" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record Telegram smoke result
        run: python3 scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Commit telegram smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json governance/reports/telegram_send_smoke_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-657 telegram send smoke result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# Static validation: no heredoc markers and required send path present.
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_heredoc_marker','pass':"<<" not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'uses_shell_message_variable','pass':'MESSAGE=' in text and '--data-urlencode "text=${MESSAGE}"' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'uses_recorder_script','pass':'scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'commit_conflict_safe','pass':'git diff --cached --quiet' in text and '--autostash' in text,'evidence':str(wf)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'TELEGRAM_SMOKE_WORKFLOW_STATIC_CHECK_FAILED','failed':failed}

(triggers/'telegram_send_smoke.trigger').write_text('BEM-657 trigger telegram send smoke no heredoc 2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'+sep)
(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger').write_text('BEM-657 retrigger curator hourly report after telegram smoke YAML fix 2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'TELEGRAM_SMOKE_WORKFLOW_NO_HEREDOC.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-657 | Telegram Smoke Workflow No Heredoc'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Telegram send smoke workflow must not use inline heredoc. Message is passed through a shell variable and curl `--data-urlencode`.'+sep)

state={'schema_version':'telegram_smoke_workflow_no_heredoc.v1','bem':'BEM-657','status':status,'checks':checks,'workflow':str(wf),'triggers':['governance/triggers/telegram_send_smoke.trigger','governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger'],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem657_fix_telegram_smoke_workflow_no_heredoc.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem657_fix_telegram_smoke_workflow_no_heredoc.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-657 | Fix Telegram Smoke Workflow No Heredoc | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem657_fix_telegram_smoke_workflow_no_heredoc','cycle_id':'bem657-fix-telegram-smoke-workflow-no-heredoc','source':'executor','status':status,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem657_fix_telegram_smoke_workflow_no_heredoc']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['telegram_delivery_repair_status']='telegram_smoke_yaml_fixed_triggered'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:50 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem657_fix_telegram_smoke_workflow_no_heredoc.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-657 '+status.upper()+': telegram-send-smoke.yml no-heredoc fix committed and triggers updated.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(wf),str(triggers/'telegram_send_smoke.trigger'),str(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed telegram-send-smoke.yml by removing heredoc, using shell message variable, and retriggering smoke/hourly workflows')
"""
No issue comments.
